scripts.build: npm run build -w @plynth/shared && npm run build -w @plynth/backend && npm run build -w @plynth/frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @plynth/shared && concurrently -n shared,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm:dev -w @plynth/shared" "npm:dev -w @plynth/backend" "npm:dev -w @plynth/frontend"
